candidates.why: This is a separate operating-expense D&A line at the same level as the selected overhead buckets ('Personnel expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'). Because XSGA_COMPONENTS was built from those two rows only, this standalone D&A line appears outside that selected bucket and should be added separately. It is also the summary row, so it is preferred over the component rows.
Component of the total D&A disclosure; should not be chosen because the summary row 'Depreciation and amortisation' exists.

variables.notes: OK. Selected XSGA bucket consists only of 'Personnel expenses' plus 'Other operating expenses'. The separate same-level row 'Depreciation and amortisation' sits outside that bucket and should therefore be added separately. No XRD row is selected, so there is no R&D symmetry issue here.
